description: Style NoteThis pair of sandals gets the season look right. This pair from enroute are apt for the beach and will look great with your cropped pants as well! Product DetailsOrange sandal with leather straps, a toe separator and an adjustable strap at the backfoot with a buckleLeather footbed with brandingDurable rubber outsole textured on the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
